---
title: "EIU Viewpoint"
page-layout: article
---

# EIU Viewpoint

## Description

Political and economic intelligence platform providing country analysis, forecasts, policy insights, and risk assessments. Useful for international business, public policy, and global market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](https://viewpoint-eiu-com.yale.idm.oclc.org/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
